ancient_books.title: Collect 5 Ancient Books from Chiseled Bookshelves (Immersive Enchanting) — dungeon/structure loot

immersive_enchant.title: Use Immersive Enchanting to apply a chosen enchantment without RNG — select exact enchant from Ancient Book

subtitle.text: No RNG. You choose the enchantment. Ancient Books are the currency. Chiseled Bookshelves are the source.

description: CH.16 · IMMERSIVE ENCHANTING
▸ Vanilla enchanting is RNG.
Immersive Enchanting removes the RNG.
You gather Ancient Books — the enchantment currency.
You place them in Chiseled Bookshelves around your enchanting table.
You choose exactly which enchantment to apply.
The cost is the Ancient Book, not levels.
This is the correct way to enchant in Ch16.
◈ HOW IMMERSIVE ENCHANTING WORKS
└ Ancient Books: found in Chiseled Bookshelves in structures
(Ancient Cities: best source; Bastions, End Cities, Strongholds)
└ Chiseled Bookshelf (vanilla): place near Enchanting Table
Load with Ancient Books to power the table
└ Enchanting table UI: with Ancient Books in bookshelves,
you see the full enchantment list and can select exactly
└ Material cost: each enchantment costs specific Ancient Books
+ standard experience levels (no level gambling)
◈ ENCHANTMENT SELECTION STRATEGY
└ Priority 1: Mending on all Celestial Netherite armor pieces
(Mending = effectively infinite durability via XP)
└ Priority 2: Protection IV on all armor (standard max)
└ Priority 3: Sharpness V on sword (then upgrade to VI via Ancient Tome)
└ Priority 4: Efficiency V on pickaxe (then VI via Ancient Tome)
└ Use Immersive Enchanting for all Celestial gear enchants:
the gear is too expensive to waste on RNG rolls
◈ ANCIENT BOOK FARMING
└ Best source: Ancient Cities (Skulk deep underground)
Risk: Warden territory — sculk_warding scroll provides context
(Ch09 Warden + Ch10 sculk content — you have this gear)
└ Secondary source: Lootr dungeon loot
(Lootr: per-player loot reset — revisit structures for more books)
└ Tertiary: Bastion Remnants, Strongholds, End Cities
▸ Every civilization chose enchanting differently.
The first ones gambled with levels and hoped.
The later ones found the library approach.
Ancient Books are what the previous libraries left behind.
The knowledge is already written.
You are paying with found knowledge, not with luck.
That is the correct approach at Ch16.
▶ Collect 5 Ancient Books [check]
▶ Apply an Immersive Enchanting selection to a piece of gear [check]
◇ Ancient Tomes (Quark) work differently from Ancient Books (Immersive).
Ancient Tomes add +1 level to an existing enchantment above the vanilla cap.
(Sharpness V + Ancient Tome = Sharpness VI)
Stack: Immersive Enchanting first (to V), then Ancient Tome (to VI).
Both are required for the true ceiling.
